holdings.infoBox: EFG is an equity ETF with a total of 379 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 6.69%, AstraZeneca at 2.45%, Tokyo Electron at 1.82%, Commonwealth Bank of Australia at 1.74%, and Kioxia Holdings at 1.69%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI EAFE Growth ETF (EFG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE Growth index, a market-cap-weighted index of developed-market growth stocks from Europe, Australia and the Far East. EFG was launched on Aug 1, 2005 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: EFG shares jump 3% following record profitability
data.text: EFG International shares were up 3% early on Thursday after the Swiss private bank reported net profit of more than 240 million Swiss francs ($270.09 million) for the first 10 months of the year and e...
